mapper.sql: pml.medical_id,pml.work_and_hazard, pml.job_name, pml.job_id, pml.employee_name,pml.work_card, pml.quantity, pml.medical_class,pml.with_id, pml.medical_result, pml.remake, pml.enabled_flag, pml.id, pml.create_time, pml.employee_id, pml.first_time, pml.create_by, pml.update_time, pml.update_by,pml.to_dept_name,pml.to_department,pml.to_team_name, pml.to_job_name, pml.to_job_id, pml.from_dept_name,pml.from_department,pml.from_team_name, (select pmlr.project_name + '、' from pm_medical_line_relevance pmlr where pmlr.medical_line_id = pml.id for xml Path('')) as medical_name

${tAlias}.medical_id as ${tAlias}_medical_id,${tAlias}.work_and_hazard as ${tAlias}_work_and_hazard, ${tAlias}.job_name as ${tAlias}_job_name, ${tAlias}.job_id as ${tAlias}_job_id, ${tAlias}.employee_name as ${tAlias}_employee_name, ${tAlias}.work_card as ${tAlias}_work_card, ${tAlias}.quantity as ${tAlias}_quantity, ${tAlias}.medical_class as ${tAlias}_medical_class, ${tAlias}.with_id as ${tAlias}_with_id, ${tAlias}.medical_result as ${tAlias}_medical_result, ${tAlias}.remake as ${tAlias}_remake, ${tAlias}.enabled_flag as ${tAlias}_enabled_flag, ${tAlias}.id as ${tAlias}_id, ${tAlias}.employee_id as ${tAlias}_employee_id, ${tAlias}.create_time as ${tAlias}_create_time, ${tAlias}.create_by as ${tAlias}_create_by, ${tAlias}.update_time as ${tAlias}_update_time, ${tAlias}.update_by as ${tAlias}_update_by, ${tAlias}.first_time as ${tAlias}_first_time

select
,
,
,
,fdev.ext_dept_name AS dept_name, fdev.ext_department_name AS department, fdev.ext_team_name AS team, fdev.cost_center as cost_center
from pm_medical_line pml join pm_medical pm on pml.medical_id = pm.id left join pm_employee pe on pe.id=pml.employee_id and pe.enabled_flag=1 left outer join pm_employee_job pej on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pej.job_main_flag = 1 and pej.enabled_flag = 1 left outer join fnd_dept_ext_v fdev on pej.dept_id = fdev.id and fdev.enabled_flag = 1 and fdev.deleted_flag = 0
mapper.insert: insert into pm_medical_line (medical_id,work_and_hazard, job_name, job_id, employee_name, work_card,quantity, medical_class,with_id, medical_result, remake, enabled_flag,employee_id, create_time, create_by, update_time, update_by, first_time, from_dept_name,from_department,to_team_name,from_team_name, to_dept_name,to_department,to_job_name,to_job_id) values (#{medicalId,jdbcType=BIGINT},#{workAndHazard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR} ,#{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, #{medicalClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{withId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{medicalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{remake,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, #{employeeId,jdbcType=BIT}, #{createTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{createBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, #{firstTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP},#{fromDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{fromDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toTeamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{fromTeamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{toDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{toJobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR},#{toJobId,jdbcType=VARCHAR})
mapper.update: update pm_medical_line set medical_id = #{medicalId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, work_and_hazard = #{workAndHazard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_name = #{jobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, job_id = #{jobId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, employee_name = #{employeeName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, work_card = #{workCard,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, employee_id = #{employeeId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, quantity = #{quantity,jdbcType=INTEGER}, medical_class = #{medicalClass,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, with_id = #{withId,jdbcType=BIGINT}, medical_result = #{medicalResult,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, remake = #{remake,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, enabled_flag = #{enabledFlag,jdbcType=BIT}, update_time = #{updateTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, update_by = #{updateBy,jdbcType=BIGINT}, first_time = #{firstTime,jdbcType=TIMESTAMP}, from_dept_name = #{fromDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, from_department = #{fromDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_dept_name = #{toDeptName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_department = #{toDepartment,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_job_name = #{toJobName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_job_id = #{toJobId,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, from_team_name = #{fromTeamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, to_team_name = #{toTeamName,jdbcType=VARCHAR} where id = #{id,jdbcType=BIGINT}
update pm_medical_line set medical_result = '${medicalResult}', update_time = getdate(), first_time = getdate() where id = ${id}
mapper.select: where pml.employee_name = '${employeeName}' and pml.medical_class = '${medicalClass}' and (pml.medical_result is null or pml.medical_result = '') and pml.enabled_flag = 1 order by pml.update_by desc

select pe.name as employeeName,pej.job_name as jobName,pej.job_id as jobId,pe.work_card as workCard,pmj.harm_factory as work_and_hazard, pej.employee_id as employeeId,pej.enabled_flag as enabledFlag from pm_employee pe join pm_employee_job pej on pe.id = pej.employee_id and pej.enabled_flag = 1 and pej.job_main_flag = 1 left join pm_medical_job pmj on pmj.job_id=pej.job_id and pmj.dept_id=pej.dept_id where not exists ( select 1 from pm_medical pm join pm_medical_line pml on pm.id = pml.medical_id where (pml.medical_class in ('干部层年度体检','特殊工种年度体检','普通员工年度体检') or ( pml.medical_class in ('调动体检','借调体检') and DATEDIFF(month, pml.first_time, getdate()) <= 3 )) and (pm.approval_result='pass' or pm.approval_result='通过' ) and (datepart(yy,pm.approval_date) =YEAR(GETDATE())) and pml.employee_id = pe.id ) order by pe.name
